items.title: Is This the Last Christmas for These 3 Stocks?
items.description: A strong brand can signal quality and consistency to consumers in seconds — for example, Nike‘s (NYSE:NKE) swoosh for reliability or Apple‘s (NASDAQ:AAPL) apple for sleek innovation. It builds loyalty and drives sales without endless explanations. But branding has limits. It can’t fix deeper problems like shifting tastes or outdated offerings. Even without scandals, irrelevance ... Is This the Last Christmas for These 3 Stocks?
